TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Talawadaw no pangcah Talawadaw a Niyaor,iteni i fata'an tangsa' i pusku ci sra a ci nakaw o lalengawan si no pangcah i tira ci lagasan ko olip na no to'as ci sra a ci nakaw o tatapangan si no pangcah na i tira ci langasan maepod taila kiwit sa ci wawa san ci nakaw ci tapang masra ci calaw panahay,ci karo o korol citomay i masra i tira say i amis i tira ciwidian hananay a nirao o yanan a fikeloh i tira say i sapat oroma' ni tapangya masra ci calaw panahay i tira say i kiwit ci karo o kowol i tira i tafalong o tenod kono kiwit o kawal kono tafalong o danoang kono nataoran hatira'ay korairay tonano o toas hatira'ay kolenak no mita o pangcah
S.PHON: ta…ĺawa…¨~…ģaw no~u paŇč ¶ańß ta…ĺawa…¨~…ģaw a nijao~ur,it…ôni i fata °an taŇčsa ° i po~u~usko~u~u ¶i sra a ¶i nakaw o~u …ĺa…ĺ…ôŇčawan si no~u paŇč ¶ańß i tira ¶i …ĺa*asan ko~u o~u…ĺip na no~u to~u °as ¶i sra a ¶i nakaw o~u tatapaŇčan si no~u paŇč ¶ańß na i tira ¶i …ĺaŇčasan ma…ôpo~u…¨~…ģ tai…ĺa kiwit sa ¶i wawa san ¶i nakaw ¶i tapaŇč masra ¶i ¶a…ĺaw panańßaj, ¶i karo~u o~u ko~uro~u…ĺ ¶ito~umaj i masra i tira saj i amis i tira ¶iwi…¨~…ģian ńßananaj a nirao~u o~u janan a fik…ô…ĺo~uńß i tira saj i sapat o~uro~uma ° ni tapaŇčja masra ¶i ¶a…ĺaw panańßaj i tira saj i kiwit ¶i karo~u o~u ko~uwo~u…ĺ i tira i tafa…ĺo~uŇč o~u t…ôno~u…¨~…ģ ko~uno~u kiwit o~u kawa…ĺ ko~uno~u tafa…ĺo~uŇč o~u …¨~…ģano~uaŇč ko~uno~u natao~uran ńßatira °aj ko~urairaj to~unano~u o~u to~uas ńßatira °aj ko~u…ĺ…ônak no~u mita o~u paŇč ¶ańß
S.FORM: Talawadaw no pangcah Talawadaw a Niyaor,iteni i fata'an tangsa' i pusku ci sra a ci nakaw o lalengawan si no pangcah i tira ci lagasan ko olip na no to'as ci sra a ci nakaw o tatapangan si no pangcah na i tira ci langasan maepod taila kiwit sa ci wawa san ci nakaw ci tapang masra ci calaw panahay,ci karo o korol citomay i masra i tira say i amis i tira ciwidian hananay a nirao o yanan a fikeloh i tira say i sapat oroma' ni tapangya masra ci calaw panahay i tira say i kiwit ci karo o kowol i tira i tafalong o tenod kono kiwit o kawal kono tafalong o danoang kono nataoran hatira'ay korairay tonano o toas hatira'ay kolenak no mita o pangcah
S.PHON: ta…ĺawa…¨~…ģaw no~u paŇč ¶ańß ta…ĺawa…¨~…ģaw a nijao~ur,it…ôni i fata °an taŇčsa ° i po~u~usko~u~u ¶i sra a ¶i nakaw o~u …ĺa…ĺ…ôŇčawan si no~u paŇč ¶ańß i tira ¶i …ĺa*asan ko~u o~u…ĺip na no~u to~u °as ¶i sra a ¶i nakaw o~u tatapaŇčan si no~u paŇč ¶ańß na i tira ¶i …ĺaŇčasan ma…ôpo~u…¨~…ģ tai…ĺa kiwit sa ¶i wawa san ¶i nakaw ¶i tapaŇč masra ¶i ¶a…ĺaw panańßaj, ¶i karo~u o~u ko~uro~u…ĺ ¶ito~umaj i masra i tira saj i amis i tira ¶iwi…¨~…ģian ńßananaj a nirao~u o~u janan a fik…ô…ĺo~uńß i tira saj i sapat o~uro~uma ° ni tapaŇčja masra ¶i ¶a…ĺaw panańßaj i tira saj i kiwit ¶i karo~u o~u ko~uwo~u…ĺ i tira i tafa…ĺo~uŇč o~u t…ôno~u…¨~…ģ ko~uno~u kiwit o~u kawa…ĺ ko~uno~u tafa…ĺo~uŇč o~u …¨~…ģano~uaŇč ko~uno~u natao~uran ńßatira °aj ko~urairaj to~unano~u o~u to~uas ńßatira °aj ko~u…ĺ…ônak no~u mita o~u paŇč ¶ańß
